final:
module power_gating (
    input wire control,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output wire [7:0] data_out
);
    assign data_out = control ? data_in : 8'b0;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (control == 1'b0) begin
        data_out <= 8'b11111111;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
